info.title: Crypto Trading Bot API
info.description: REST API for the crypto trading bot. Provides access to trades, signals, portfolio state, performance metrics, MDSE distortion events, and system diagnostics.

get.description: Return trade history with optional symbol and date-range filters.

CircuitBreakerData.title: CircuitBreakerData
CircuitBreakerData.description:
Circuit breaker state payload.

Supports both the full state from circuit_breaker_state.json
(portfolio_state, strategy_states, etc.) and the simplified
fallback (status, message) when the state file is absent.

CircuitBreakerStateResponse.title: CircuitBreakerStateResponse
CircuitBreakerStateResponse.description: Wrapper payload for circuit breaker state responses.

CycleDetailResponse.title: CycleDetailResponse
CycleDetailResponse.description: Detailed cycle response including regime and signal summaries.

CycleResponse.title: CycleResponse
CycleResponse.description: Response payload describing one orchestration cycle.

DailyStrategyPnlResponse.title: DailyStrategyPnlResponse
DailyStrategyPnlResponse.description: Daily realized PnL aggregated by strategy.

DetectorScoreResponse.title: DetectorScoreResponse
DetectorScoreResponse.description: Detector performance score row used for MDSE weighting.

detector.title: Detector
detector.description: Alias for detector_name for Dashboard compatibility.

DistortionEventResponse.title: DistortionEventResponse
DistortionEventResponse.description: Response payload for an MDSE distortion event.

DistortionTradeResponse.title: DistortionTradeResponse
DistortionTradeResponse.description: Trade row linked to an MDSE distortion event.

EquityCurveResponse.title: EquityCurveResponse
EquityCurveResponse.description: Equity-curve response payload with metadata range fields.

ExecutionQualityResponse.title: ExecutionQualityResponse
ExecutionQualityResponse.description: Execution-quality row returned by performance endpoints.

MarketSnapshotResponse.title: MarketSnapshotResponse
MarketSnapshotResponse.description: Market indicator snapshot row returned by performance endpoints.

MdseConfidenceBucket.title: MdseConfidenceBucket
MdseConfidenceBucket.description: Histogram bucket for MDSE confidence distribution.

MdseCorrelationPairResponse.title: MdseCorrelationPairResponse
MdseCorrelationPairResponse.description: Correlation metrics for a detector pair within a time window.

MdseCorrelationResponse.title: MdseCorrelationResponse
MdseCorrelationResponse.description: Top-level response payload for MDSE detector correlation endpoint.

MdseDetectorHitRateTrendPoint.title: MdseDetectorHitRateTrendPoint
MdseDetectorHitRateTrendPoint.description: Per-detector hit-rate trend datapoint for a time bucket.

MdseDetectorSummary.title: MdseDetectorSummary
MdseDetectorSummary.description: Per-detector aggregate metrics used in MDSE summary responses.

MdseEventTrendPoint.title: MdseEventTrendPoint
MdseEventTrendPoint.description: Time-bucket point for MDSE event-count trend charts.

MdseSummaryResponse.title: MdseSummaryResponse
MdseSummaryResponse.description: Top-level response payload for MDSE summary endpoint.

MdseVirtualPnlResponse.title: MdseVirtualPnlResponse
MdseVirtualPnlResponse.description: Virtual PnL snapshot derived from MDSE event progression.

PerformanceSummaryResponse.title: PerformanceSummaryResponse
PerformanceSummaryResponse.description: Aggregated performance statistics over executed trades.

PortfolioData.title: PortfolioData
PortfolioData.description: Portfolio snapshot including positions and balances.

PortfolioPosition.title: PortfolioPosition
PortfolioPosition.description: Position details for a symbol in portfolio state responses.

PortfolioStateResponse.title: PortfolioStateResponse
PortfolioStateResponse.description: Wrapper payload for portfolio state endpoint responses.

RegimeDetail.title: RegimeDetail
RegimeDetail.description: Parsed regime metadata attached to a cycle response.

example.description: Negative FR with cloud breakout and volume spike

SignalResponse.title: SignalResponse
SignalResponse.description: Response payload for a generated trading signal.

SignalStats.title: SignalStats
SignalStats.description: Signal-level aggregates calculated for a cycle.

StrategiesResponse.title: StrategiesResponse
StrategiesResponse.description: Portfolio strategy list with live performance summary.

StrategyAllocation.title: StrategyAllocation
StrategyAllocation.description: Single strategy entry from the active portfolio plan.

SystemHealthResponse.title: SystemHealthResponse
SystemHealthResponse.description: Health-check response from the runtime health server.

SystemMetricsResponse.title: SystemMetricsResponse
SystemMetricsResponse.description: Metrics response from the runtime health server.

TimelinePricePoint.title: TimelinePricePoint
TimelinePricePoint.description: Price point for structured timeline response.

TimelineResponse.title: TimelineResponse
TimelineResponse.description: Structured timeline response with separate prices and events lists.

TradeSummaryResponse.description: Aggregate trade performance metrics for summary endpoints.
